title: Ohara Defies the Government
description: The World Government destroys Ohara, and Robin’s tragedy becomes a direct symbol of its cruelty.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Nico Robin, Spandam, Nico Olvia, Marine Soldier, Professor Clover. The World Government destroys Ohara, and Robin’s tragedy becomes a direct symbol of its cruelty.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: What are you implying, Dr. Professor Clover...?

dialogue.speaker: Marine Soldier
dialogue.text: The world government came to existence.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: The existence of this enormous kingdom....!!

dialogue.speaker: Professor Clover
dialogue.text: It prided itself on its great power,

dialogue.speaker: Jaguar D. Saul
dialogue.text: Later known as the world govern-ment,

dialogue.speaker: Spandine
dialogue.text: That's a bold hypothesis, isn't it...?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: More importantly, this history will surely reveal

summary: The World Government destroys Ohara, and Robin’s tragedy becomes a direct symbol of its cruelty.
